first-date.outro: you make it through the drive and the first hello waits ahead

outcome.success: you find her by the theater and the night settles once you stop looking at your phone. the conversation is awkward in the good way and easy after that. before long the two of you are texting every day
outcome.failure: you get there late and a little rattled and the first few minutes never quite smooth out. the date still happens but something stays slightly off. you keep talking after that though the start is harder than it needed to be

prompts.reply: give me a minute to park

prompts.incoming: okay i think i see you
do you want popcorn or coffee after

marriage.outro: you get home but the real conversation is still waiting

outcome.success: you get home in time to eat together and the talk that follows is still difficult but calmer than it could have been. later when the hospital visits begin the two of you hold on to nights like this
outcome.failure: you walk in late and tense and the conversation hardens before either of you can slow it down. the house is quiet after but not peaceful. later when the hospital calls start this night is one of the things you both remember

prompts.incoming: will you make it by seven
the kids keep asking where you are
please dont walk in distracted again
prompts.reply: i know just let me get home

prompts.incoming: we still need to talk about saturday
prompts.reply: i remember we will talk tonight
i will call her after dinner

dying-wife.outro: the road ends but the worst part is still ahead

outcome.success: you make it to her room while she is still awake enough to know you are there. there is almost nothing left to fix so you sit with her and stay. after that you stop answering messages behind the wheel
outcome.failure: you reach the ward a few minutes too late and spend the rest of the night listening to other people describe what you missed. the drive home is silent except for every sound your phone still makes. after that you stop answering messages behind the wheel

prompts.incoming: she woke up and asked for you
do you want me to say anything

prompts.reply: im leaving the car and running
